allow: Bash(cd "c:/Users/parks/OneDrive/개인개발/Stream Watcher" && stat -c '%y %n' src/core/notify/*.js electron/main.js src/config/store.js src/renderer/*.html src/renderer/*.css src/renderer/*.js 2>&1 | sort)
PowerShell(Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.ProcessName -match "electron|broadcast|node" } | Select-Object Id, ProcessName, MainWindowTitle, StartTime | Format-Table -AutoSize)
PowerShell(Get-Process electron -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.MainWindowTitle } | Select-Object Id, MainWindowTitle)
PowerShell($p = Get-Process electron -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.MainWindowTitle -eq "방송 상태 모니터링" }; if \($p\) { $p.Id } else { "none" })
PowerShell($p = Get-Process electron -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.MainWindowTitle -eq "방송 상태 모니터링" }; if \($p\) { "PID $\($p.Id\)" } else { "none" })

PowerShell($dev = Get-ItemProperty 'HKLM:\\SOFTWARE\\Microsoft\\Windows\\CurrentVersion\\AppModelUnlock' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($dev\) { "DeveloperMode = $\($dev.AllowDevelopmentWithoutDevLicense\)" } else { "no key" }; $admin = \([Security.Principal.WindowsPrincipal] [Security.Principal.WindowsIdentity]::GetCurrent\(\)\).IsInRole\([Security.Principal.WindowsBuiltInRole]::Administrator\); "isAdmin = $admin")
PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\electron-builder\\Cache\\winCodeSign\\929044675\\" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue -Recurse | Select-Object FullName, Mode | Select-Object -First 30)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Users\\parks\\OneDrive\\개인개발\\Stream Watcher\\dist" -File | Select-Object Name, @{N='SizeMB';E={[math]::Round\($_.Length/1MB,1\)}}, LastWriteTime | Format-Table -AutoSize)
PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; $p = Get-Process electron -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.MainWindowTitle -eq "방송 상태 모니터링" }; if \($p\) { "PID $\($p.Id\)" } else { "none" })

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Users\\parks\\OneDrive\\개인개발\\Stream Watcher\\dist" -File | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object Name, @{N='SizeMB';E={[math]::Round\($_.Length/1MB,1\)}}, LastWriteTime | Format-Table -AutoSize)
PowerShell($env:ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE=$null; Remove-Item Env:ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; npm run build:win 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 80)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "c:\\Users\\parks\\OneDrive\\개인개발\\Stream Watcher\\dist\\" | Select-Object Name, @{N='Size\(MB\)';E={[math]::Round\($_.Length/1MB,2\)}}, LastWriteTime | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell(Get-NetUDPEndpoint -LocalPort 49152 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { $p = Get-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; [PSCustomObject]@{ LocalAddress=$_.LocalAddress; Port=$_.LocalPort; PID=$_.OwningProcess; Process=$p.ProcessName } } | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "c:\\Users\\parks\\OneDrive\\개인개발\\Stream Watcher\\dist\\방송 상태 모니터링 Setup 0.1.0.exe" | Select-Object Name, @{N='Size\(MB\)';E={[math]::Round\($_.Length/1MB,2\)}}, LastWriteTime | Format-Table -AutoSize)
PowerShell(Get-ChildItem dist -File | Select-Object Name, @{N='Size\(MB\)';E={[math]::Round\($_.Length/1MB,1\)}}, LastWriteTime | Format-Table -AutoSize)
